dag_desc: Fix 5 friction points from reorientation-002 session: advance on feature branches, error context propagation, duplicate advance implementations, validator preview, commit-msg agent awareness

tasks.desc: Allow 'roadmap advance' on feat/* and wip/* branches — the gitsafe main-only gate should exempt advance (read-only: validates + records evidence to completed.json). Keep make/dag-mutate gated to main.

validate.statement: Plan clarity: advance on feature branches is unambiguous — exempt advance from enforceMainBranch, keep make/dag gated

validate.command: git checkout -b wip/test-advance-branch 2>/dev/null; bin/roadmap advance --note 'branch test' 2>&1 | grep -qv 'only allowed from main'; EC=$?; git checkout main 2>/dev/null; git branch -D wip/test-advance-branch 2>/dev/null; exit $EC

tasks.desc: advanceNode in bin/roadmap.ts reimplements artifact-exists/shell/intent validation parallel to validateNode in protocol/validation.ts. Unify: advanceNode should call validateNode instead of its own loop. This fixes the artifact-exists crash (no target) and any future validator drift.

validate.statement: Plan clarity: advance calls validateNode — single validation implementation, no parallel loop in CLI

tasks.desc: RoadmapError catch block (bin/roadmap.ts:289) should forward ALL context fields to CLI output, not just code/message/fix. Spread rej.context into errorPayload (minus internal fields). Add test.

validate.statement: Plan clarity: all RoadmapError context fields appear in CLI JSON output — no silent drops

tasks.desc: Add --dry-run flag to 'roadmap make': runs full validation pipeline (spec checks + tasksToDAG + define/verify/check + intent gates) but does NOT write head.json or commit. Returns { ok, errors[], dag } so agents can test specs before loading.

validate.statement: Plan clarity: make --dry-run validates without side effects — no head.json write, no git commit

tasks.desc: commit-msg hook: on feat/* branches, also accept 'feat/<branch-name>:' prefix (agents commit with node IDs that match the branch). Reduces friction for agents whose commit messages already contain the node ID but not in the exact format.

validate.statement: Plan clarity: commit-msg accepts feat/branch-name prefix and is more lenient on feat/* branches

tasks.desc: Integration: all 5 friction fixes work together. Agent can advance on feature branch, make --dry-run previews errors, error context propagates, commit-msg accepts agent format.

validate.statement: All 5 friction points resolved — agents can complete full make→advance loop on feature branches without orchestrator intervention
